title: Compatibility
subtitle: Build your aquarium and check if species can live together
analysisNote: Analysis based on ideal parameters. Aquarium size, fish quantity and decoration also influence results.
addSpecies: Add species to build your aquarium
addOneMore: Add one more species to check compatibility
diffWater: Species from different water types (freshwater vs saltwater). Incompatible.
bothAggressive: Both species are aggressive/territorial. High conflict risk.
aggVsPeaceful: One species is aggressive and the other peaceful. The peaceful one may suffer stress.
bothPeaceful: Both species are peaceful. Good cohabitation expected.
oneAggressive: One species may be aggressive. Monitor cohabitation.
predationDanger: PREDATION RISK: {{bigger}} ({{bigSize}} cm) may prey on {{smaller}} ({{smallSize}} cm). Very large size difference and carnivorous diet.
predationHigh: High risk: {{bigger}} is carnivorous and significantly larger than {{smaller}}. May attempt predation.
predationModerate: Moderate risk: {{bigger}} is carnivorous and larger than {{smaller}}. Monitor, especially with fry.
sizeDiffRelevant: Relevant size difference ({{big}} cm vs {{small}} cm), but no direct predation risk.
invertDanger: DANGER: {{fish}} feeds on invertebrates and may prey on {{invert}}.
invertSizeRisk: {{fish}} is much larger than {{invert}}. May pose a risk to the invertebrate.
plantRisk: {{name}} may eat or damage aquatic plants.
